235.reason: [This early return causes the parser to stop parsing any further declarations once it sees a function definition, but according to the grammar CompUnit → {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef, declarations can appear before function definitions, and the parser should continue parsing remaining declarations until it finds the first non-declaration. The return statement incorrectly terminates the entire declaration parsing phase upon encountering the first function definition.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This early return causes the parser to stop parsing any further declarations once it sees a function definition, but according to the grammar CompUnit → {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef, declarations can appear before function definitions, and the parser should continue parsing remaining declarations until it finds the first non-declaration. The return statement incorrectly terminates the entire declaration parsing phase upon encountering the first function definition.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [This early return prevents parsing of any declarations that come after function definitions, violating the grammar CompUnit → {Decl} {FuncDef} MainFuncDef which allows interleaved Decl and FuncDef]

1045.reason: [错误的行号计算：回退2个token后读取的token可能不是最后一个非终结符，应该回退1个token并使用当前token的行号]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [错误的行号计算：回退2个token后读取的token可能不是最后一个非终结符，应该回退1个token并使用当前token的行号]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [错误的行号定位逻辑：回退2个token后读取的token可能不是最后一个非终结符，导致错误报告在错误的行上]

1177.reason: [错误：应该报告前一个非终结符的行号，而不是当前token（可能是后续无关token）的行号]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [错误：应该报告前一个非终结符的行号，而不是当前token（可能是后续无关token）的行号]

1952.reason: [错误：unReadToken(2)后readNextToken()可能无法准确定位到数组表达式中最后一个有效非终结符的行号]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [错误：unReadToken(2)后readNextToken()可能无法准确定位到数组表达式中最后一个有效非终结符的行号]

2817.reason: [错误：回退逻辑不准确，可能导致获取错误的行号；应记录ConstExp或Exp解析完成时的最后一个token行号]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [错误：回退逻辑不准确，可能导致获取错误的行号；应记录ConstExp或Exp解析完成时的最后一个token行号]
